CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON NOV-19-2009 TO ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-14-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812
CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-14-2010 TO APR-15-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 206 DUE TO COURT'S CLOSURE DAY. (206)

CONTINUED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON APR-15-2010 TO DEPT 206 ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON DEC-16-2010 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 206 FOR STATUS OF BANKRUPT DEFENDANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE WEDNESDAY'S ASBESTOS CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CONTINUED TO THE FOLLOWING DAY SO THAT IT WILL BE HEARD ON THE SAME DAY AS BRAYTON'S CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. THE 8/18/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 8/19/10. THE 10/20/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 10/21/10. THE 12/15/10 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS CONTINUED TO 12/16/10. THE COURT CONFER WITH COUNSEL RE TIMELINES FOR DEMAND EXCHANGE. A HEARING IS SET FOR 5/13/10 AT 1:30P.M. IN DEPT. 206 FOR COMMENTS. RESPONSES ARE DUE BY 5/7/10 AND MAY BE FILED UNDER THE COMPLEX ASBESTOS LITIGATION, CASE #828684. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: D. LOK (206) COURT REPORTER KIM RICHARDSON, CSR #5915, IS PRESENT FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE'S COUNSEL, BERRY & BERRY.
